source: go/ast scan of fmt.Errorf/errors.New sites in internal/{promql,logql,traceql} (non-test files); classification + trigger queries are curated and pinned by test/rejection-parity

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unknown binary op %s
entries.rationale: unreachable: the parser produces only the 12 arithmetic/comparison ops (all mapped) plus and/or/unless, which lowerBinary routes to lowerVectorSetOp before this map is consulted

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: not a vector set operator: %s
entries.rationale: unreachable: only called when syntax.IsLogicalBinOp(op) is true, and the three logical ops are all mapped

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: binary expression has nil leg(s)
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the pinned parser never yields a binary expression with nil legs

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: scalar-only binary expression not folded (op %s) — internal invariant violation
entries.rationale: internal invariant (the message says so): scalar-only binaries are constant-folded before this branch

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unsupported vector-matching cardinality %d
entries.rationale: LogQL's VectorMatchCardinality enum stops at CardOneToMany; no parser-producible value reaches the default arm

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side; use group_left/group_right when projecting include labels
entries.rationale: include labels require group_left/group_right in the grammar, which set many-to-one / one-to-many cardinality; include with one-to-one is not parser-producible

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: ip: invalid operation for label filter (only = and != support ip())
entries.rationale: unreachable: the LogQL grammar only builds IPLabelFilter for = and != (syntax.y: IDENTIFIER EQ/NEQ IP OPEN_PARENTHESIS ...)

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: ip: invalid operation for line filter (only |= and != support ip())

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: ip: invalid pattern %q

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: label_replace has nil inner
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser never yields label_replace with a nil inner expression

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: `| json` expression has empty identifier
entries.rationale: the grammar requires a non-empty identifier on `| json foo=...` expression stages; an empty identifier is a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unsupported JSON path segment type %T in %q
entries.rationale: the upstream jsonpath parser produces only string and array-index segments, both handled

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: invalid `| json` path %q: %w

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unsupported label filterer %T
entries.rationale: unreachable: all seven parser-producible LabelFilterer types are handled (String, LineFilter, Binary, Numeric, Duration, Bytes, IP); NoopLabelFilter only arises from stage-building (ReduceAndLabelFilter on an empty list), never from the AST

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unknown line-filter match type %s
entries.rationale: unreachable: all six parser-producible LineMatchTypes are handled (the four substring/regex arms here; pattern and ip route out of lineFilterPart earlier)

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: `| logfmt` expression has empty identifier
entries.rationale: the grammar requires a non-empty identifier on `| logfmt foo=...` expression stages; an empty identifier is a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unsupported expression %T

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: pipeline stage %T is not yet supported
entries.rationale: type-switch default: every pipeline-stage type the pinned parser produces is handled

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: parser stage `| %s` is not yet supported
entries.rationale: every LineParserExpr op the pinned grammar produces (json / regexp / unpack / pattern) is handled; bare `| logfmt` parses as LogfmtParserExpr

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: `| regexp` pattern %q has no named captures
entries.rationale: the parser pre-validates capture-less regexp patterns as a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: invalid `| regexp` pattern %q: %w
entries.rationale: the parser pre-validates the regexp; a compile failure is a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: `| regexp` pattern has duplicate named capture %q
entries.rationale: the parser pre-validates duplicate named captures as a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: `| regexp` requires a non-empty pattern
entries.rationale: the parser pre-validates `| regexp ""` ("at least one named capture must be supplied") as a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: invalid pattern line filter %q: %w

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: invalid pattern line filter %q: %w
entries.rationale: unreachable: pattern.ParseLiterals re-parses with the same grammar that pattern.ParseLineFilter already accepted one line above; error propagation (%w) kept for defence

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: range-aggregation inner is %T (not MatchersExpr or PipelineExpr)
entries.rationale: the pinned parser yields only MatchersExpr / PipelineExpr as log-range inners

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: quantile_over_time requires a phi parameter
entries.rationale: the parser rejects quantile_over_time without a parameter before lowering

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: range-aggregation has nil inner
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser never yields a range aggregation with a nil inner

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: range op %s is not yet supported
entries.rationale: unreachable: every lexer-producible range op is mapped (rate/bytes_rate/rate_counter/count/bytes plus the *_over_time family incl. first/last; absent_over_time routes to lowerAbsentOverTime first); the dunder sharding ops (__quantile_sketch_over_time__, __first/last_over_time_ts__) have no lexer tokens

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: %s does not accept `| unwrap`
entries.rationale: the parser rejects bytes_rate / bytes_over_time with `| unwrap` ("invalid aggregation ... with unwrap"); guard kept against a future parser loosening

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: %s requires an `| unwrap` clause
entries.rationale: the parser rejects sum_over_time-family operations without `| unwrap` ("invalid aggregation ... without unwrap")

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: range op %s is not yet supported
entries.rationale: unreachable: without unwrap the parser only admits rate/count_over_time/bytes_rate/bytes_over_time/absent_over_time (all handled or routed earlier); every other lexable op requires unwrap and takes the unwrap branch

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: rangeValueExprFromMerged called without `| unwrap`
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the caller routes only unwrap-carrying range aggregations here

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: `| unwrap` has empty identifier
entries.rationale: the grammar requires a non-empty unwrap identifier; an empty one is a parse error

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: unsupported unwrap conversion %q
entries.rationale: every conversion the grammar accepts (bytes / duration / duration_seconds) is handled

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: aggregation operation %q is unsupported

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: vector-aggregation inner is not an Expr (%T)
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser's vector-aggregation inner always implements syntax.Expr

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: vector-aggregation has nil inner
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser never yields a vector aggregation with a nil inner

entries.head: logql
entries.message: logql: vector-aggregation inner is not an Expr (%T)
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser's vector-aggregation inner always implements syntax.Expr (mirror of lowerVectorAggregation#4f64fcaa)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: absent() expects 1 argument, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: parser.Functions pins absent at exactly one argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: absent() argument must be an instant-vector selector, got %T

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: matrix selector's inner must be a VectorSelector, got %T
entries.rationale: the parser only builds MatrixSelector around a VectorSelector

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: absent_over_time() expects 1 argument, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: parser.Functions pins absent_over_time at exactly one argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: absent_over_time() argument must be a range-vector selector, got %T
entries.rationale: subquery arguments are intercepted by lowerOuterRangeFnOverSubquery; the parser's typechecker admits only matrix-typed arguments otherwise

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: scalar-only binary expression not folded (op %s) — internal invariant violation
entries.rationale: internal invariant (the message says so): scalar-only binaries are constant-folded before this branch

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: 'bool' modifier is only allowed on comparison binary ops
entries.rationale: the parser rejects `bool` on non-comparison operators ("bool modifier can only be used on comparison operators")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side; use group_left/group_right when projecting include labels
entries.rationale: include labels require group_left/group_right in the grammar, which set many-to-one / one-to-many cardinality; include with one-to-one is not parser-producible

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: 'bool' modifier is only allowed on comparison binary ops
entries.rationale: the parser rejects `bool` on non-comparison operators ("bool modifier can only be used on comparison operators")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side
entries.rationale: CardManyToMany arises only from set operators, which route to lowerVectorSetOp before this check

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unsupported vector-matching cardinality %d
entries.rationale: the parser's VectorMatchCardinality enum values are all handled; no parser-producible value reaches the default arm

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: vector set op %s should route through lowerVectorSetOp
entries.rationale: internal routing invariant: set operators are dispatched to lowerVectorSetOp before op mapping

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: binary op %s unsupported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: not a vector set operator: %s
entries.rationale: internal routing invariant: only parser set-operator tokens reach this mapper

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unknown date function %s
entries.rationale: internal dispatch: lowerCall routes only the known date-function names here

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s expects 0 or 1 argument, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: the date functions are declared variadic 0..1 in parser.Functions ("expected at most 1 argument(s)")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unknown date function %s
entries.rationale: internal dispatch: lowerCall routes only the known date-function names here

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: histogram_quantile second argument must be a histogram VectorSelector

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: histogram_quantile expects 2 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: parser.Functions pins histogram_quantile at exactly two arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: histogram_quantile requires a scalar-literal phi (computed phi is unsupported)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s requires a scalar-literal bound

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: clamp requires scalar-literal bounds for min and max

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: clamp expects 3 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity for clamp (three arguments)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unknown clamp function %s
entries.rationale: internal dispatch: lowerCall routes only clamp / clamp_min / clamp_max here

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s expects 2 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity for clamp_min / clamp_max (two arguments)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s with %d arguments is unsupported (instant math fns are unary)
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: the unary instant math functions are pinned at one argument in parser.Functions

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: round(v, to_nearest) requires a scalar literal to_nearest

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: label_join expects at least 3 arguments (v, dst, separator[, src…]), got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: label_join requires at least three arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: label_replace expects 5 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: label_replace requires exactly five arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s(%s) requires a string literal, got %T
entries.rationale: the parser's typechecker admits only string literals in string-typed argument slots (PromQL has no other string-producing expression)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: quantile(phi, ...) requires a scalar literal phi (computed phi is unsupported)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: aggregation %s does not take a parameter
entries.rationale: the parser rejects a parameter on non-parameterised aggregations ("wrong number of arguments for aggregate expression")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: group() does not take a parameter
entries.rationale: the parser rejects a parameter on group() ("wrong number of arguments for aggregate expression")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: aggregation op %s is not yet supported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s changes output shape and lands with M1.7 result shaping
entries.rationale: count_values is intercepted by lowerCountValues / lowerSubqueryOverCountValues on every parser-producible path before buildAggFunc is consulted

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unsupported expression %T

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: function %s is not yet supported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: count_values requires a string-literal label name as the first arg
entries.rationale: the parser's typechecker admits only a string literal as count_values' first argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: count_values requires a non-empty label name

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s expects exactly 1 argument, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: the range-vector functions are pinned at one argument in parser.Functions

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: matrix selector's inner must be a VectorSelector, got %T
entries.rationale: the parser only builds MatrixSelector around a VectorSelector

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s argument must be a range-vector selector, got %T
entries.rationale: subquery arguments are intercepted by lowerOuterRangeFnOverSubquery; the parser's typechecker admits only matrix-typed arguments otherwise

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s K must be > 0

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s K must be a non-negative integer literal, got %v

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s K must be a scalar literal or scalar(<vector>); computed-K with other shapes is not yet supported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s K: %w
entries.rationale: error-propagation wrapper (%w): the wrapped scalar-lowering rejection is catalogued at its origin

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s K: scalar() expects 1 argument, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: scalar() is pinned at one argument in parser.Functions

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: aggregation op %s is not yet supported
entries.rationale: the only caller (buildAggFunc) pre-filters to the seven operators this mapper handles

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: `@ end()` modifier requires query range context (use LowerAt)
entries.rationale: the query endpoints always lower via LowerAtRange with the request window, so range context is always present; plain Lower is reached only from the matcher-metadata path, which carries no @ modifiers

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: `@ start()` modifier requires query range context (use LowerAt)
entries.rationale: the query endpoints always lower via LowerAtRange with the request window, so range context is always present; plain Lower is reached only from the matcher-metadata path, which carries no @ modifiers

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unexpected StartOrEnd token %v
entries.rationale: the parser yields only START / END / 0 in StartOrEnd

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: holt_winters smoothing factor must be in (0, 1), got %v

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: holt_winters requires scalar-literal smoothing and trend factors

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: holt_winters trend factor must be in (0, 1), got %v

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: holt_winters expects 3 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: double_exponential_smoothing is pinned at three arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: predict_linear expects 2 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: predict_linear is pinned at two arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: predict_linear requires a scalar-literal predict horizon (computed t is unsupported)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: quantile_over_time requires a scalar-literal phi (computed phi is unsupported)

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: quantile_over_time expects 2 arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: quantile_over_time is pinned at two arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: matrix selector's inner must be a VectorSelector, got %T
entries.rationale: the parser only builds MatrixSelector around a VectorSelector

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s first argument must be a range-vector selector, got %T
entries.rationale: subquery arguments are intercepted by lowerOuterRangeFnOverSubquery; the parser's typechecker admits only matrix-typed arguments otherwise

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over %s aggregation is not supported
entries.rationale: the caller (lowerSubqueryOverAggregate) pre-filters to the supported aggregation op set before consulting this builder

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over quantile(phi, ...) requires a scalar literal phi

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s does not accept a subquery argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery range must be positive, got %s
entries.rationale: the parser rejects non-positive subquery ranges ("duration must be greater than 0")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery step must be positive, got %s
entries.rationale: the parser rejects non-positive subquery steps ("duration must be greater than 0")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over %T is unsupported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over aggregation of %T is unsupported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over %s aggregation is not supported

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery inner %s expects exactly 1 argument, got %d

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery inner %s must wrap a MatrixSelector, got %T

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery inner matrix selector must wrap a VectorSelector, got %T
entries.rationale: the parser only builds MatrixSelector around a VectorSelector

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: inner subquery range must be positive, got %s
entries.rationale: the parser rejects non-positive subquery ranges ("duration must be greater than 0")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: %s does not accept a subquery argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: count_values requires a string-literal label name as the first arg
entries.rationale: the parser's typechecker admits only a string literal as count_values' first argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: count_values requires a non-empty label name

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: inner subquery range must be positive, got %s
entries.rationale: the parser rejects non-positive subquery ranges ("duration must be greater than 0")

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over %s requires a scalar literal K

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over %s K must be > 0

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery over %s K must be a non-negative integer literal, got %v

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery `@ start()` modifier requires query range context (use LowerAt)
entries.rationale: the query endpoints always lower via LowerAtRange with the request window, so range context is always present

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: subquery `@ end()` modifier requires query range context (use LowerAt)
entries.rationale: the query endpoints always lower via LowerAtRange with the request window, so range context is always present

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unexpected subquery StartOrEnd token %v
entries.rationale: the parser yields only START / END / 0 in StartOrEnd

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: time() takes no arguments, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: time() takes no arguments

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: vector() expects 1 argument, got %d
entries.rationale: parser-enforced arity: vector() is pinned at one argument

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: vector() requires a scalar-foldable argument or time()

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unary operand: %w
entries.rationale: error-propagation wrapper (%w): the wrapped rejection is catalogued at its origin

entries.head: promql
entries.message: promql: unsupported unary op %v
entries.rationale: the parser yields only +/- unary operators

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: aggregate `%s` has nil inner expression
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser never yields an aggregate with a nil inner expression

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: aggregate op %q is unsupported
entries.rationale: the grammar's aggregate ops (count / max / min / sum / avg) are all mapped; no parser-producible op reaches the default arm

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: `| group(...)` requires a field expression
entries.rationale: the grammar requires an expression inside by(...); a missing field expression is a parse error

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: operator %s is unsupported on nestedSetParent
entries.rationale: non-comparison operators never reach the nested-set evaluation: regex / arithmetic shapes fail the integer-literal check first

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s is only supported in comparisons (equality / inequality / regex)

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: instrumentation-scoped attribute %q is unsupported — the OTel ClickHouse traces schema has no scope-attributes column (instrumentation:name / instrumentation:version map to ScopeName / ScopeVersion)

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s.%s used outside a comparison; only equality / inequality / regex filters on link.* and event.* are supported

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s is only supported in root-ness comparisons (e.g. nestedSetParent < 0) and select() projections

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: chained second-stage element/separator length mismatch (%d vs %d)
entries.rationale: internal invariant: upstream's ChainedSecondStage keeps Elements and Separators in lock-step

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: chained second-stage has no elements
entries.rationale: internal invariant: the parser never yields a chained second stage with zero elements

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: field expression %T is unsupported
entries.rationale: type-switch default: every field-expression type the pinned grammar produces is handled

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: pipeline tail element %T is unsupported
entries.rationale: type-switch default: every pipeline-tail element type the pinned grammar produces is handled

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: nil comparison on intrinsic %s is unsupported — the configured schema has no events column
entries.rationale: the default OTel-CH traces schema configures an events column; reachable only under a schema override that drops it

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s requires per-span child counts the OTel ClickHouse schema does not materialise
entries.rationale: the pinned tempo parser rejects the childCount spelling ("unexpected childCount"), so the arm is unreachable from a parseable query

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s = nil is not valid because intrinsics cannot be nil

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: nil comparison on intrinsic %s is unsupported — the configured schema has no links column
entries.rationale: the default OTel-CH traces schema configures a links column; reachable only under a schema override that drops it

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: metrics filter operator %s is not a supported threshold comparison
entries.rationale: the grammar restricts metrics-filter operators to the six threshold comparisons, all of which pass isThresholdBinaryOp

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: metrics filter operator %s: %w
entries.rationale: error-propagation wrapper (%w): the grammar restricts metrics-filter operators to the six threshold comparisons, all mapped

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: metrics second-stage element %T is unsupported
entries.rationale: type-switch default: every metrics second-stage element type the pinned grammar produces is handled

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s comparisons support only integer literals

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s comparisons support only integer literals

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: nestedSetParent %s %d depends on nested-set positions the OTel ClickHouse schema does not materialise — only root-ness tests (e.g. nestedSetParent < 0) are supported

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: nestedSetParent comparisons support only integer literals, got %s

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s is unsupported — the OTel ClickHouse schema does not materialise nested-set positions

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: instrumentation-scoped attribute %q is unsupported — the OTel ClickHouse traces schema has no scope-attributes column (instrumentation:name / instrumentation:version map to ScopeName / ScopeVersion)

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: nil comparison on %s.%s is unsupported — the configured schema has no %s column
entries.rationale: the default OTel-CH traces schema configures attribute columns for every scope this branch checks; reachable only under a schema override that drops one

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s = nil is not valid because resource.service.name cannot be nil

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: pipeline element %T is unsupported
entries.rationale: type-switch default: every pipeline element type the pinned grammar produces is handled

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: empty pipeline
entries.rationale: internal invariant: tempo's Parse never returns an empty pipeline without an error

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: nil RootExpr
entries.rationale: internal invariant: tempo's Parse never returns a nil RootExpr without an error

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: scalar expression %T is unsupported

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: scalar-filter RHS must be a literal, got %T

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: scalar-filter LHS must aggregate to a series (count() / sum(...) / avg(...) / min(...) / max(...)), got %T

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: spanset expression %T is unsupported

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: static status literal has no Status() value
entries.rationale: internal invariant: a TypeStatus static always carries a Status value

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: static literal type %s is unsupported
entries.rationale: every static type the pinned grammar produces in lowerable positions (int / float / string / bool / duration / status / kind) is handled; array statics do not parse

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: static kind literal has no Kind() value
entries.rationale: internal invariant: a TypeKind static always carries a Kind value

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s(%d): limit must be > 0

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: unary operator %s is unsupported

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s operand %T is unsupported — nil comparisons require an attribute reference

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: operator %s is unsupported
entries.rationale: every operator the pinned grammar yields in binary positions is mapped; unary operators route through lowerUnaryOperation

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: second-stage op %s is not supported
entries.rationale: the grammar's metrics second stages are exactly topk / bottomk, both mapped

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: spanset op %s is not a structural relation
entries.rationale: callers pre-filter to the structural operator set before consulting this mapper

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s requires per-span child counts the OTel ClickHouse schema does not materialise
entries.rationale: the pinned tempo parser rejects the childCount spelling ("unexpected childCount"), so the arm is unreachable from a parseable query

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s requires per-event timestamp arithmetic against the Events Nested column and is unsupported

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s is trace-scoped — the OTel ClickHouse schema stores one row per span and does not materialise whole-trace values

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s is only supported in root-ness comparisons (e.g. nestedSetParent < 0) and select() projections

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: intrinsic %s has no OTel ClickHouse backing column and is unsupported
entries.rationale: every intrinsic the pinned grammar parses either has a backing column, a dedicated arm above, or is intercepted earlier; no parseable intrinsic reaches the default arm

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: compare() selection filter lowered to no predicate
entries.rationale: every parseable compare() selection filter (including `{}` and constant-true filters) lowers to a predicate

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: compare() requires a selection spanset filter
entries.rationale: the grammar requires a spanset-filter argument on compare(); Filter() is never nil for a parseable query

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: quantile_over_time requires at least one quantile
entries.rationale: the grammar requires at least one quantile argument on quantile_over_time

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: empty by(...) group key
entries.rationale: the grammar rejects an empty by() group key as a parse error

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: histogram_over_time requires an attribute operand
entries.rationale: the grammar admits only attribute operands inside histogram_over_time(...)

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: metrics pipeline element %T is unsupported
entries.rationale: type-switch default: every metrics pipeline element type the pinned grammar produces is handled

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: histogram_over_time must lower via lowerMetricsHistogramOverTime
entries.rationale: internal routing invariant: histogram_over_time is dispatched to lowerMetricsHistogramOverTime before this mapper

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: metrics aggregate op %s is unsupported
entries.rationale: every metrics aggregate op the pinned grammar produces is mapped

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: %s requires an attribute operand
entries.rationale: the grammar admits only attribute operands inside the *_over_time(...) metrics aggregates

entries.head: traceql
entries.message: traceql: `| select(...)` requires at least one attribute
entries.rationale: the grammar rejects an empty select() as a parse error
